description: Small and faded fragment of a legal deed regarding  a lawsuit by the 'great elder, the haver' Dosa b. [Yehoshuaʿ(?)] of a shipment of musk held  by Ṭāhir b. Ibrāhīm from the wakil in Alexandria Khalaf b. Rabīʿ.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
